content: Web-based logistics MIS uses a three-layer architecture: (1) Presentation Layer — SPA frontend with per-module views (procurement, warehouse, dashboard), (2) Application Layer — REST API server containing business logic, auth middleware, and service classes, (3) Data Layer — relational database. Modern WMS also adds a Platform Services layer (event bus, notifications) but SME/academic scope stays at the three-layer model. Frontend communicates with backend exclusively through REST (JSON). Each functional domain maps to a module/service with clear boundaries.
